# /sk:deep-interview

Crystallize requirements before any implementation begins. Uses weighted ambiguity scoring across 4 dimensions — stops asking only when clarity reaches ≥80%.

## When to Run

- Task is vague: "improve X", "build something for Y", "make it better"
- You want to ensure nothing is assumed before planning starts
- Auto-triggered by `/sk:autopilot` and `/sk:start` for open-ended inputs

## Steps

Run the full deep-interview skill. See `skills/sk:deep-interview/SKILL.md` for complete mechanics.

1. Initialize — check for existing spec, detect brownfield context
2. Interview loop — one targeted question per round until ambiguity ≤ 20%
3. Generate `tasks/spec.md` — goal, constraints, non-goals, acceptance criteria, assumptions
4. Handoff — tell user spec is ready; `/sk:brainstorm` reads it automatically

## Output

`tasks/spec.md` — feeds directly into `/sk:brainstorm` and `/sk:write-plan`.
